_description: Organisation IAL register. Maintained by the designated governance authority. Read by ial-ceiling-check workflow.
_format: Add one entry per organisation member whose verified IAL is above 1.

_ial_levels.1: Authenticated GitHub user — GitHub login only
_ial_levels.2: Organisation member with enforced 2FA and SAML SSO — GitHub platform maximum
_ial_levels.3: External IdP with hardware token linked to GitHub SAML identity — out-of-band approval required
_ial_levels.4: Physical presence verification by designated governance authority — out-of-band approval required
